markdownRemark.html:
Awesome PHP

A curated list of amazingly awesome PHP libraries, resources and shiny things.

Contributing and Collaborating

Please see CONTRIBUTING, CODE-OF-CONDUCT and COLLABORATING for details.

Composer Repositories

Composer Repositories.

  • Firegento - Magento Module Composer Repository.
  • Packagist - The PHP Package Repository.
  • Private Packagist - Composer package archive as a service for PHP.
  • WordPress Packagist - Manage your plugins with Composer.

Dependency Management

Libraries for dependency and package management.

  • Composer Installersstars1.3k - A multi framework Composer library installer.
  • Composer - A package and dependency manager.
  • Melody - A tool to build one file Composer scripts.
  • Picklestars1.4k - A PHP extension installer.

Dependency Management Extras

Extras related to dependency management.

  • Composedstars47 - A library to parse your project's Composer environment at runtime.
  • Composer Merge Pluginstars729 - A composer plugin to merge several composer.json files.
  • Composer Patchesstars1.1k - A plugin for Composer to apply patches.
  • Compoer Require Checkerstars570 - CLI tool to analyze composer dependencies and verify that no unknown symbols are used in the sources of a package.
  • Composer Unusedstars674 - A CLI Tool to scan for unused composer packages.
  • Prestissimostars6.3k - A composer plugin which enables parallel install process.
  • Repman - A private PHP package repository manager and Packagist proxy.
  • Satisstars2.6k - A static Composer repository generator.
  • toolystars99 - A library to manage PHAR files in project using Composer.
  • Toran Proxy - A static Composer repository and proxy.

Frameworks

Web development frameworks.

  • CakePHP - A rapid application development framework.
  • Laminas - A framework comprised of individual components (previously Zend Framework).
  • Laravel - A web application framework with expressive, elegant syntax.
  • Nette - A web framework comprised of mature components.
  • Phalcon - A framework implemented as a C extension.
  • Spiral - A high performance PHP/Go framework.
  • Symfony - A set of reuseable components and a web framework.
  • Yii2stars13.7k - A fast, secure, and efficient web framework.

Framework Extras

Extras related to web development frameworks.

  • CakePHP CRUDstars343 - A Rapid Application Development (RAD) plugin for CakePHP.
  • Knp RAD Components - A set of Rapid Application Development (RAD) components for Symfony.
  • LaravelSstars3.3k - Glue for using Swoole in Laravel or Lumen.
  • Symfony CMFstars740 - A Content Management Framework to create custom CMS.

Content Management Systems (CMS)

Tools for managing digital content.

  • Backdrop - A CMS targeting small-to-medium sized business and non-profits (a fork of Drupal).
  • Concrete5 - A CMS targeting users with a minimum of technical skills.
  • CraftCMSstars2.6k - A flexible, user-friendly CMS for creating custom digital experiences on the web and beyond.
  • Drupal - An enterprise level CMS.
  • Gravstars12.7k - A modern flat-file CMS.
  • Joomla - Another leading CMS.
  • Kirby - A flat-file CMS that adapts to any project.
  • Magento - The most popular ecommerce platform.
  • Moodle - An open-source learning platform.
  • Pico CMS - A stupidly simple, blazing fast, flat file CMS.
  • Statamic - Build beautiful, easy to manage websites.
  • WordPress - A blogging platform and CMS.

Components

Standalone components from web development frameworks and development groups.

  • Aura - Independent components, fully decoupled from each other and from any framework.
  • CakePHP Plugins - A directory of CakePHP plugins.
  • Hoa Project - Another package of PHP components.
  • Laravel Components - The Laravel Framework components.
  • League of Extraordinary Packages - A PHP package development group.
  • Spatie Open Source - A collection of open source PHP and Laravel packages.
  • Symfony Components - The components that make Symfony.
  • Laminas Components - The components that make the Laminas Framework.

Micro Frameworks

Micro frameworks and routers.

  • Laravel-Zero - A micro-framework for console applications.
  • Lumen - A micro-framework by Laravel.
  • Mezzio - A micro-framework by Laminas.
  • Radarstars51 - An Action-Domain-Responder implementation for PHP.
  • Sillystars799 - A micro-framework for CLI applications.
  • Slim - Another simple micro framework.

Micro Framework Extras

Extras related to micro frameworks and routers.

  • Slim Skeletonstars1.4k - A skeleton for Slim.
  • Slim Twig Viewstars302 - Integrate Twig into Slim.
  • Slim PHP Viewstars202 - A simple PHP renderer for Slim.

Routers

Libraries for handling application routing.

  • Aura.Routerstars445 - A full-featured routing library.
  • Fast Routestars4.4k - A fast routing library.
  • Kleinstars2.6k - A flexible router.
  • Puxstars1.3k - Another fast routing library.
  • Routestars543 - A routing library built on top of Fast Route.

Templating

Libraries and tools for templating and lexing.

  • MtHamlstars362 - A PHP implementation of the HAML template language.
  • Mustachestars3.1k - A PHP implementation of the Mustache template language.
  • PHPTAL - A PHP implementation of the TAL templating language.
  • Plates - A native PHP templating library.
  • Smarty - A template engine to complement PHP.
  • Twig - A comprehensive templating language.

Static Site Generators

Tools for pre-processing content to generate web pages.

  • Couscous - Couscous turns Markdown documentation into beautiful websites. It's GitHub Pages on steroids.
  • Jigsaw - Simple static sites with Laravel's Blade.
  • Sculpin - A tool that converts Markdown and Twig into static HTML.
  • Spress - An extensible tool that converts Markdown and Twig into HTML.

HTTP

Libraries for working with HTTP.

  • Buzzstars1.9k - Another HTTP client.
  • Guzzlestars20.8k - A comprehensive HTTP client.
  • HTTPlug - An HTTP client abstraction without binding to a specific implementation.
  • Nyholm PSR-7stars719 - A super lightweight PSR-7 implementation. Very strict and very fast.
  • PHP VCR - A library for recording and replaying HTTP requests.
  • Requestsstars3.4k - A simple HTTP library.
  • Retrofitstars151 - A library to ease creation of REST API clients.
  • Symfony HTTP Clientstars1.2k - A component to fetch HTTP resources synchronously or asynchronously.
  • Laminas Diactorosstars231 - PSR-7 HTTP Message implementation.

Scraping

Libraries for scraping websites.

  • DiDOMstars1.9k - A super fast HTML scrapper and parser.
  • Embedstars1.7k - An information extractor from any web service or page.
  • Gouttestars8.4k - A simple web scraper.
  • Symfony Pantherstars2.3k - A browser testing and web crawling library for PHP and Symfony.
  • PHP Spiderstars1.2k - A configurable and extensible PHP web spider.

Middlewares

Libraries for building application using middlewares.

  • PSR-7 Middlewaresstars666 - Inspiring collection of handy middlewares.
  • Relaystars290 - A PHP 5.5 PSR-7 middleware dispatcher.
  • Stack - A library of stackable middleware for Symfony.
  • Laminas Stratigilitystars26 - Middleware for PHP built on top of PSR-7.

URL

Libraries for parsing URLs.

  • PHP Domain Parserstars841 - A domain suffix parser library.
  • Purlstars892 - A URL manipulation library.
  • sabre/uristars267 - A functional URI manipulation library.
  • Uristars685 - Another URL manipulation library.

Email

Libraries for sending and parsing email.

  • CssToInlineStylesstars5.4k - A library to inline CSS in email templates.
  • Email Reply Parserstars572 - An email reply parser library.
  • Email Validatorstars145 - A small email address validation library.
  • Fetchstars496 - An IMAP library.
  • Mauticstars4.5k - Email marketing automation
  • PHPMailerstars16.6k - Another mailer solution.
  • PHP IMAPstars1.3k - A library to access mailboxes via POP3, IMAP and NNTP.
  • Stampiestars282 - A library for email services such as SendGrid, PostMark, MailGun and Mandrill.
  • SwiftMailer - A mailer solution.
  • Symfony Mailerstars652 - A powerful library for creating and sending emails.

Files

Libraries for file manipulation and MIME type detection.

  • CSVstars2.8k - A CSV data manipulation library.
  • Flysystemstars11.9k - Abstraction for local and remote filesystems.
  • Gaufrettestars2.4k - A filesystem abstraction layer.
  • Hoa Mimestars100 - Another MIME detection library.
  • PHP FFmpegstars3.8k - A wrapper for the FFmpeg video library.
  • UnifiedArchivestars248 - A unified reader and writer of compressed archives.

Streams

Libraries for working with streams.

  • ByteStream - An asynchronous stream abstraction.
  • Streamerstars264 - A simple object-orientated stream wrapper library.

Dependency Injection

Libraries that implement the dependency injection design pattern.

  • Aura.Distars323 - A serializable dependency injection container with constructor and setter injection, interface and trait awareness, configuration inheritance, and much more.
  • Acclimatestars217 - A common interface to dependency injection containers and service locators.
  • Aurynstars709 - A recursive dependency injector.
  • Containerstars685 - Another flexible dependency injection container.
  • Discostars135 - A PSR-11 compatible, annotation-based dependency injection container.
  • PHP-DI - A dependency injection container that supports autowiring.
  • Pimple - A tiny dependency injection container.
  • Symfony DIstars3.4k - A dependency injection container component.

Imagery

Libraries for manipulating images.

  • Color Extractorstars1.1k - A library for extracting colours from images.
  • Glidestars2.2k - An on-demand image manipulation library.
  • Image Hashstars1.6k - A library for generating perceptual image hashes.
  • Image Optimizerstars791 - A library for optimizing images.
  • Imagine - An image manipulation library.
  • Intervention Imagestars11.9k - Another image manipulation library.
  • PHP Image Workshopstars852 - Another image manipulation library.

Testing

Libraries for testing codebases and generating test data.

  • Alicestars2.2k - An expressive fixture generation library.
  • AspectMockstars736 - A mocking framework for PHPUnit/Codeception.
  • Atoumstars1.4k - A simple testing library.
  • Behat - A behaviour driven development (BDD) testing framework.
  • Codeceptionstars4.3k - A full stack testing framework.
  • Fakerstars1.5k - A fake data generator library.
  • HTTP Mockstars382 - A library for mocking HTTP requests in unit tests.
  • Infectionstars1.4k - An AST-based PHP Mutation testing framework.
  • Kahlanstars1.1k - Full stack Unit/BDD testing framework with built-in stub, mock and code-coverage support.
  • Mink - Web acceptance testing.
  • Mockerystars9.8k - A mock object library for testing.
  • ParaTeststars1.7k - A parallel testing library for PHPUnit.
  • Pest - A testing framework with a focus on simplicity.
  • Peridotstars327 - An event driven test framework.
  • Phakestars457 - Another mock object library for testing.
  • Phostars287 - Another behaviour driven development testing framework.
  • PHP-Mockstars300 - A mock library for built-in PHP functions (e.g. time()).
  • PHP MySQL Enginestars436 - A MySQL engine written in pure PHP.
  • PHPSpecstars1.8k - A design by specification unit testing library.
  • PHPT - A test tool used by PHP itself.
  • PHPUnitstars17.6k - A unit testing framework.
  • Prophecystars8k - A highly opinionated mocking framework.
  • VFS Streamstars1.3k - A virtual filesystem stream wrapper for testing.

Continuous Integration

Libraries and applications for continuous integration.

  • CircleCI - A continuous integration platform.
  • GitlabCi - Let GitLab CI test, build, deploy your code. TravisCi like.
  • Jenkins - A continuous integration platform with PHP support.
  • JoliCistars662 - A continuous integration client written in PHP and powered by Docker.
  • PHPCIstars2.4k - An open source continuous integration platform for PHP.
  • SemaphoreCI - A continuous integration platform for open source and private projects.
  • Shippable - A Docker based continious integration platform for open source and private projects.
  • Travis CI - A continuous integration platform.
  • Setup PHPstars1.6k - A GitHub Action for PHP.

Documentation

Libraries for generating project documentation.

  • APIGenstars2.1k - Another API documentation generator.
  • daux.iostars615 - A documentation generator which uses Markdown files.
  • PHP Documentor 2stars3k - A documentation generator.
  • phpDox - A documentation generator for PHP projects (that is not limited to API documentation).

Security

Libraries for generating secure random numbers, encrypting data and scanning and testing for vulnerabilities.

  • Halite - A simple library for encryption using libsodiumstars9.2k.
  • HTML Purifierstars2.2k - A standards compliant HTML filter.
  • IniScanstars1.5k - A tool that scans PHP INI files for security.
  • Optimusstars1.1k - Id obfuscation based on Knuth's multiplicative hashing method.
  • PHPGGCstars1.6k - A library of PHP unserializeable payloads along with a tool to generate them.
  • PHP Encryptionstars3.3k - Secure PHP Encryption Library.
  • PHP SSHstars346 - An experimental object orientated SSH wrapper library.
  • PHPSecLib - A pure PHP secure communications library.
  • random_compatstars7.8k - PHP 5.x support for random_bytes() and random_int()
  • RandomLibstars815 - A library for generating random numbers and strings.
  • Symfony Security Monitoring - A web tool to check your Composer dependencies for security advisories, previously known as "SensioLabs Security Check".
  • SQLMapstars20k - An automatic SQL injection and database takeover tool.
  • TCryptostars53 - A simple encrypted key-value storage library.
  • VAddy - A continuous security testing platform for web applications.
  • Zap - An integrated penetration testing tool for web applications.

Passwords

Libraries and tools for working with and storing passwords.

  • GenPhrasestars94 - A library for generating secure random passphrases.
  • Password Compatstars2.1k - A compatibility library for the new PHP 5.5 password functions.
  • Password Policystars71 - A password policy library for PHP and JavaScript.
  • Password Validatorstars142 - A library for validating and upgrading password hashes.
  • Password-Generatorstars227 - PHP library to generate random passwords.
  • PHP Password Libstars372 - A library for generating and validating passwords.
  • phpass - A portable password hashing framework.
  • Zxcvbn PHPstars627 - A realistic PHP password strength estimate library based on Zxcvbn JS.

Code Analysis

Libraries and tools for analysing, parsing and manipulating codebases.

  • Better Reflectionstars900 - AST-based reflection library that allows analysis and manipulation of code
  • Code Climate - An automated code review.
  • GrumPHPstars3.5k - A PHP code-quality tool.
  • PHP Parserstars14.5k - A PHP parser written in PHP.
  • PHP Semantic Versioning Checkerstars415 - A command line utility that compares two source sets and determines the appropriate semantic versioning to apply.
  • Phpactorstars616 - PHP completion, refactoring and introspection tool.
  • PHPLOCstars2.1k - A tool for quickly measuring the size of a PHP project.
  • PHPQAstars511 - A tool for running QA tools (phploc, phpcpd, phpcs, pdepend, phpmd, phpmetrics).
  • Qafoo Quality Analyzerstars493 - A tool to visualize metrics and source code.
  • Rectorstars4.1k - A tool to upgrade and refactor code.
  • Scrutinizer - A web tool to scrutinise PHP codestars446.
  • UBenchstars539 - A simple micro benchmark library.

Code Quality

Libraries for managing code quality, formatting and linting.

  • CaptainHookstars519 - An easy-to-use and flexible Git hook library.
  • PHP CodeSnifferstars8.5k - A library that detects PHP, CSS and JS coding standard violations.
  • PHP CS Fixerstars10.1k - A coding standards fixer library.
  • PHP Mess Detectorstars1.9k - A library that scans code for bugs, sub-optimal code, unused parameters and more.
  • PHPCheckstylestars152 - A tool to help adhere to certain coding conventions.
  • PHPCPDstars2.1k - A library that detects copied and pasted code.

Static Analysis

Libraries for performing static analysis of PHP code.

  • Exakatstars354 - A static analysis engine for PHP.
  • Deptracstars1.5k - A static code analysis tool that helps to enforce rules for dependencies between software layers.
  • Mondrianstars381 - A code analysis tool using Graph Theory.
  • phanstars5.1k - A static analyzer based on PHP 7+ and the php-ast extension.
  • PHP Architecture Testerstars540 - Easy to use architecture testing tool for PHP.
  • PHPCompatibilitystars1.6k - A PHP compatibility checker for PHP CodeSniffer.
  • PhpDependencyAnalysisstars511 - A tool to create customisable dependency graphs.
  • PHP Metricsstars2.1k - A static metric library.
  • PHP Migrationstars189 - A static analyzer for PHP version migration.
  • PHPStanstars9.8k - A PHP Static Analysis Tool.
  • Psalmstars4.1k - A static analysis tool for finding errors in PHP applications.

Architectural

Libraries related to design patterns, programming approaches and ways to organize code.

  • Design Patterns PHPstars19.6k - A repository of software patterns implemented in PHP.
  • Finite - A simple PHP finite state machine.
  • Functional PHPstars1.8k - A functional programming library.
  • Iterstars990 - A library that provides iteration primitives using generators.
  • Patchwork - A library for redefining userland functions.
  • Pipelinestars816 - A pipeline pattern implementation.
  • Porterstars549 - Data import abstraction library for consuming Web APIs and other data sources.
  • Rulerstars958 - A simple stateless production rules engine.
  • RulerZstars839 - A powerful rule engine and implementation of the Specification pattern.

Debugging and Profiling

Libraries and tools for debugging errors and profiling code.

  • APM - Monitoring extension collecting errors and statistics into SQLite/MySQL/StatsD.
  • Barbushin PHP Consolestars1.3k - Another web debugging console using Google Chrome.
  • Blackfire.io - A low-overhead code profiler.
  • Kintstars2.5k - A debugging and profiling tool.
  • PCOVstars498 - A self contained code coverage compatible driver.
  • PHP Consolestars510 - A web debugging console.
  • PHP Debug Bar - A debugging toolbar.
  • PHPBenchstars1.3k - A benchmarking Framework.
  • PHPSpystars1.1k - A low-overhead sampling profiler.
  • Symfony VarDumperstars6.6k - A variable dumper component.
  • Tideways.io - Monitoring and profiling tool.
  • Tracystars1.4k - A simple error detection, logging and time measuring library.
  • Whoopsstars12.4k - A pretty error handling library.
  • xDebugstars2.4k - A debug and profile tool for PHP.
  • XHProfstars2.5k - A profiling tool originally developed by Facebook.
  • Z-Ray - A debug and profile tool for Zend Server.

Build Tools

Project build and automation tools.

  • Boxstars600 - A utility to build PHAR files.
  • Constructstars260 - A PHP project/micro-package generator.
  • Phing - A PHP project build system inspired by Apache Ant.

Task Runners

Libraries for automating and running tasks.

  • Bldr - A PHP Task runner built on Symfony components.
  • Jobbystars974 - A PHP cron job manager without modifying crontab.
  • Robostars2.4k - A PHP Task runner with object-orientated configurations.
  • Task - A pure PHP task runner inspired by Grunt and Gulp.

Navigation

Tools for building navigation structures.

  • KnpMenustars1.2k - A menu library.
  • Menustars549 - A flexible menu library with a fluent interface.

Asset Management

Tools for managing, compressing and minifying website assets.

  • JShrinkstars640 - A JavaScript minifier library.
  • Laravel Mixstars4.7k - An elegant wrapper around Webpack for the 80% use case.
  • Symfony Assetstars2.6k - Manages URL generation and versioning of web assets.
  • Symfony Encorestars1.9k - A simple but powerful API for processing and compiling assets built around Webpack.

Geolocation

Libraries for geocoding addresses and working with latitudes and longitudes.

  • GeoCoder - A geocoding library.
  • GeoJSONstars243 - A GeoJSON implementation.
  • GeoToolsstars1.2k - A library of geo-related tools.
  • PHPGeostars1.3k - A simple geo library.

Date and Time

Libraries for working with dates and times.

  • CalendR - A calendar management library.
  • Carbonstars15.2k - A simple DateTime API extension.
  • Chronosstars1.2k - A DateTime API extension supporting both mutable and immutable date/time.
  • Moment.phpstars903 - Moment.js inspired PHP DateTime handler with i18n support.
  • Yasumistars798 - An library to help you calculate the dates and names of holidays.

Event

Libraries that are event-driven or implement non-blocking event loops.

  • Ampstars3.2k - An event driven non-blocking I/O library.
  • Broadwaystars1.4k - An event source and CQRS library.
  • CakePHP Eventstars15 - An event dispatcher library.
  • Elephant.iostars1.2k - Yet another web socket library.
  • Evenementstars1.1k - An event dispatcher library.
  • Eventstars1.4k - An event library with a focus on domain events.
  • Hoa EventSourcestars106 - An event source library.
  • Hoa WebSocketstars423 - Another web socket library.
  • Prooph Event Storestars508 - An event source component to persist event messages
  • PHP Deferstars215 - Golang's defer statement for PHP.
  • Ratchetstars5.4k - A web socket library.
  • ReactPHPstars8k - An event driven non-blocking I/O library.
  • RxPHPstars1.5k - A reactive extension library.
  • Swoolestars16.8k - An event-driven asynchronous and concurrent networking communication framework with high performance for PHP written in C.
  • Workermanstars9.3k - An event driven non-blocking I/O library.

Logging

Libraries for generating and working with log files.

  • Monologstars18.7k - A comprehensive logger.

E-commerce

Libraries and applications for taking payments and building online e-commerce stores.

  • Moneystars3.6k - A PHP implementation of Fowler's money pattern.
  • Brick\Moneystars891 - A money library for PHP, with support for contexts, cash roundings, currency conversion.
  • OmniPaystars5.3k - A framework agnostic multi-gateway payment processing library.
  • Payumstars1.6k - A payment abstraction library.
  • Shopwarestars1.2k - Highly customizable e-commerce software
  • Swapstars1.2k - An exchange rates library.
  • Sylius - An open source e-commerce solution.

PDF

Libraries and software for working with PDF files.

  • Dompdfstars7.9k - A HTML to PDF converter.
  • PHPPdfstars324 - A library for generating PDFs and images from XML.
  • Snappystars3.8k - A PDF and image generation library.
  • WKHTMLToPDFstars11.1k - A tool to convert HTML to PDF.

Office

Libraries for working with office suite documents.

  • PHPPowerPointstars1.1k - A library for working with Microsoft PowerPoint Presentations.
  • PHPWordstars5.6k - A library for working with Microsoft Word documents.
  • PHPSpreadsheetstars9.8k - A pure PHP library for reading and writing spreadsheet files (successor of PHPExcel).
  • Spoutstars3.5k - Read and write spreadsheet files (CSV, XLSX and ODS), in a fast and scalable way .

Database

Libraries for interacting with databases using object-relational mapping (ORM) or datamapping techniques.

  • Atlas.Ormstars430 - A data mapper implementation for your persistence model in PHP.
  • Aura.Sqlstars485 - Provides an extension to the native PDO along with a profiler and connection locator.
  • Aura.SqlQuerystars380 - Independent query builders for MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite, and Microsoft SQL Server.
  • Baumstars2.2k - A nested set implementation for Eloquent.
  • CakePHP ORMstars140 - Object-Relational Mapper, implemented using the DataMapper pattern.
  • Cycle ORMstars842 - PHP DataMapper, ORM.
  • Doctrine Extensionsstars3.5k - A collection of Doctrine behavioural extensions.
  • Doctrine - A comprehensive DBAL and ORM.
  • Laravel Eloquentstars2.2k - A simple ORM.
  • Pommstars158 - An Object Model Manager for PostgreSQL.
  • ProxyManagerstars4.3k - A set of utilities to generate proxy objects for data mappers.
  • RedBean - A lightweight, configuration-less ORM.
  • Spot2stars599 - A MySQL datamapper ORM.

Migrations

Libraries to help manage database schemas and migrations.

  • Doctrine Migrations - A migration library for Doctrine.
  • Migrationsstars37 - A migration management library.
  • Phinxstars4.2k - Another database migration library.
  • PHPMigstars544 - Another migration management library.
  • Ruckusingstars502 - Database migrations for PHP ala ActiveRecord Migrations with support for MySQL, Postgres, SQLite.

NoSQL

Libraries for working with "NoSQL" backends.

  • PHPMongostars230 - A MongoDB ORM.
  • Predisstars6.8k - A feature complete Redis library.

Queue

Libraries for working with event and task queues.

  • Bernardstars1.1k - A multibackend abstraction library.
  • BunnyPHPstars579 - A performant pure-PHP AMQP (RabbitMQ) sync and also async (ReactPHP) library.
  • Pheanstalkstars1.8k - A Beanstalkd client library.
  • PHP AMQPstars3.8k - A pure PHP AMQP library.
  • Tarantool Queuestars57 - PHP bindings for Tarantool Queue.
  • Thumperstars273 - A RabbitMQ pattern library.
  • Enqueuestars1.9k - A message queue packages for PHP that supports RabbitMQ, AMQP, STOMP, Amazon SQS, Redis and Doctrine transports.

Search

Libraries and software for indexing and performing search queries on data.

  • Elasticastars2.1k - A client library for ElasticSearch.
  • ElasticSearch PHPstars4.5k - The official client library for ElasticSearch.
  • Solarium - A client library for Solr.
  • SphinxQL Query Builder - A query library for the Sphinx and Manticore search engines.

Command Line

Libraries related to the command line.

  • Aura.Clistars104 - Provides the equivalent of request ( Context ) and response ( Stdio ) objects for the command line interface, including Getopt support, and an independent Help object for describing commands.
  • Borisstars2.2k - A tiny PHP REPL.
  • Cilexstars627 - A micro framework for building command line tools.
  • CLI Menustars1.7k - A library for building CLI menus.
  • CLIFrameworkstars404 - A command-line framework supports zsh/bash completion generation, subcommands and option constraints. It also powers phpbrew.
  • CLImatestars1.7k - A library for outputting colours and special formatting.
  • Commandostars788 - Another simple command line opt parser.
  • Cron Expressionstars4.8k - A library to calculate cron run dates.
  • GetOptstars309 - A command line opt parser.
  • GetOptionKitstars140 - Another command line opt parser.
  • Hoa Consolestars357 - Another command line library.
  • PsySHstars8.9k - Another PHP REPL.
  • ShellWrapstars740 - A simple command line wrapper library.

Authentication and Authorization

Libraries for implementing user authentication and authorization.

  • Aura.Authstars122 - Provides authentication functionality and session tracking using various adapters.
  • SocialConnect Authstars459 - An open source social sign (OAuth1\OAuth2\OpenID\OpenIDConnect).
  • Json Web Tokenstars6.2k - Json Tokens to authenticate and transmit information.
  • OAuth 1.0 Clientstars854 - An OAuth 1.0 client library.
  • OAuth 2.0 Clientstars3.1k - An OAuth 2.0 client library.
  • OAuth2 Server - Another OAuth2 server implementation.
  • OAuth2 Server - An OAuth2 authentication server, resource server and client library.
  • Opauthstars1.7k - A multi-provider authentication framework.
  • PHP oAuthLibstars1.1k - Another OAuth library.
  • Sentinel Social - A library for social network authentication.
  • Sentinel - A framework agnostic authentication & authorisation library.
  • TwitterOAuthstars4.1k - A Twitter OAuth library.

Markup

Libraries for working with markup.

  • Cebe Markdownstars952 - An fast and extensible Markdown parser.
  • CommonMark PHPstars1.9k - Highly-extensible Markdown parser which fully supports the CommonMark spec.
  • Decodastars191 - A lightweight markup parser library.
  • Emojistars51 - A library that converts unicode characters and names into emoji images.
  • HTML to Markdownstars1.3k - Converts HTML into Markdown.
  • HTML5 PHPstars920 - An HTML5 parser and serializer library.
  • Parsedownstars13.6k - Another Markdown parser.
  • PHP Markdownstars3.2k - A Markdown parser.

Strings

Libraries for parsing and manipulating strings.

  • Agentstars3.7k - A PHP desktop/mobile user agent parser, based on Mobiledetect.
  • ANSI to HTML5stars189 - An ANSI to HTML5 converter library.
  • Color Jizzstars274 - A library for manipulating and converting colours.
  • Device Detectorstars2k - Another library for parsing user agent strings.
  • Hoa Stringstars404 - Another UTF-8 string library.
  • Jieba-PHPstars1.1k - A PHP port of Python's jieba. Chinese text segmentation for natural language processing.
  • Mobile-Detectstars9.7k - A lightweight PHP class for detecting mobile devices (including tablets).
  • Patchwork UTF-8stars70 - A portable library for working with UTF-8 strings.
  • Portable UTF-8stars410 - A string manipulation library with UTF-8 safe replacement methods.
  • Slugifystars2.6k - A library to convert strings to slugs.
  • SQL Formatterstars3.9k - A library for formatting SQL statements.
  • Stringystars113 - A string manipulation library with multibyte support.
  • UA Parser - A library for parsing user agent strings.
  • URLifystars639 - A PHP port of Django's URLify.js.
  • UUIDstars11.2k - A library for generating UUIDs.

Numbers

Libraries for working with numbers.

  • Brick\Mathstars966 - A library providing large number support: BigInteger, BigDecimal and BigRational.
  • ByteUnitsstars136 - A library to parse, format and convert byte units in binary and metric systems.
  • DecimalObjectstars7 - A value object to handle decimals/floats easily and more precisely.
  • LibPhoneNumber for PHPstars3.8k - A PHP implementation of Google's phone number handling library.
  • PHP Conversionstars124 - Another library for converting between units of measure.
  • PHP Units of Measurestars14 - A library for converting between units of measure.
  • MathPHPstars1.9k - A math library for PHP.

Filtering and Validation

Libraries for filtering and validating data.

  • Assertstars2.1k - A validation library with a rich set of assertions. Supports assertion chaining and lazy assertions.
  • Aura.Filterstars135 - Provides tools to validate and sanitize objects and arrays.
  • CakePHP Validationstars34 - Another validation library.
  • Filterusstars447 - A simple PHP filtering library.
  • ISO-codesstars727 - A library for validating inputs according standards from ISO, International Finance, Public Administrations, GS1, Book Industry, Phone numbers & Zipcodes for many countries.
  • JSON Schemastars3.1k - A JSON Schema validation library.
  • MetaYamlstars93 - A schema validation library that supports YAML, JSON and XML.
  • Respect Validationstars5.4k - A simple validation library.
  • Uploadstars1.6k - A library for handling file uploads and validation.
  • Valitronstars1.4k - Another validation library.
  • Volanstars41 - Another simplified validation library.

API

Libraries and web tools for developing APIs.

  • API Platform - Expose in minutes an hypermedia REST API that embraces JSON-LD, Hydra format.
  • Laminas API Tool Skeletonstars28 - An API builder built with the Laminas Framework.
  • Dreststars86 - A library for exposing Doctrine entities as REST resource endpoints.
  • HALstars201 - A Hypertext Application Language (HAL) builder library.
  • Hateoasstars970 - A HATEOAS REST web service library.
  • Negotiationstars1.2k - A content negotiation library.
  • Restlerstars1.3k - A lightweight framework to expose PHP methods as RESTful web API.
  • wsdl2phpgeneratorstars779 - A tool to generate PHP classes from SOAP WSDL files.

Caching

Libraries for caching data.

  • APIx Cachestars102 - A thin PSR-6 cache wrapper to various caching backends emphasising cache tagging and indexing.
  • CacheToolstars1.2k - A tool to clear APC/opcode caches from the command line.
  • CakePHP Cachestars47 - A caching library.
  • Doctrine Cachestars7k - A caching library.
  • Metaphorestars96 - Cache slam defense using a semaphore to prevent dogpile effect.
  • Stashstars933 - Another library for caching.
  • Laminas Cachestars35 - Another caching library.

Data Structure and Storage

Libraries that implement data structure or storage techniques.

  • CakePHP Collectionstars78 - A simple collections library.
  • Fractalstars3.4k - A library for converting complex data structures to JSON output.
  • Ginqstars179 - Another PHP library based on .NET's LINQ.
  • JsonMapperstars1.3k - A library that maps nested JSON structures onto PHP classes.
  • JSON Machinestars416 - Provides iteration over huge JSONs using simple foreach
  • Knapsackstars523 - Collection library inspired by Clojure's sequences.
  • msgpack.phpstars331 - A pure PHP implementation of the MessagePack serialization format.
  • PINQstars451 - A PHP library based on .NET's LINQ (Language Integrated Query).
  • Serializerstars2.1k - A library for serialising and de-serialising data.
  • YaLinqostars406 - Yet Another LINQ to Objects for PHP.
  • Laminas Serializerstars18 - Another library for serialising and de-serialising data.

Notifications

Libraries for working with notification software.

  • JoliNotifstars1.2k - A cross-platform library for desktop notification (support for Growl, notify-send, toaster, etc)
  • Notification Pusherstars1.1k - A standalone library for device push notifications.
  • Notificatostars218 - A library for handling push notifications.
  • Notificatorstars184 - A lightweight notification library.
  • Php-pushwooshstars60 - A PHP Library to easily send push notifications with the Pushwoosh REST Web Services.

Deployment

Libraries for project deployment.

  • Deployerstars8.5k - A deployment tool.
  • Envoystars1.4k - A tool to run SSH tasks with PHP.
  • Rocketeerstars2.7k - A fast and easy deployer for the PHP world.

Internationalisation and Localisation

Libraries for Internationalization (I18n) and Localization (L10n).

  • Aura.Intlstars82 - Provides internationalization (I18N) tools, specifically package-oriented per-locale message translation.
  • CakePHP I18nstars22 - Message translation and localization for dates and numbers.

Serverless

Libraries and tools to help build serverless web applications.

  • Bref - Serverless PHP on AWS Lambda.
  • OpenWhisk - An open-source serverless cloud platform.
  • Serverless Framework - An open-source framework for building serverless applications.
  • Laravel Vapor - A serverless deployment platform for Laravel, powered by AWS.

Configuration

Libraries and tools for configuration.

  • PHP Dotenvstars11.2k - Parse and load environment variables from .env files.
  • Symfony Dotenvstars3.1k- Parse and load environment variables from .env files.
  • Yo! Symfony TOMLstars151 - A PHP parser for TOMLstars15.3k.

Third Party APIs

Libraries for accessing third party APIs.

  • Amazon Web Service SDKstars5.2k - The official PHP AWS SDK library.
  • AsyncAWS - An unofficial asynchronous PHP AWS SDK.
  • Campaign Monitor - The official Campaign Monitor PHP library.
  • Githubstars1.9k - A library to interface with the Github API.
  • Mailgunstars970 The official Mailgun PHP API.
  • Squarestars114 - The official Square PHP SDK for payments and other Square APIs.
  • Stripestars2.9k - The official Stripe PHP library.
  • Twiliostars1.3k - The official Twilio PHP REST API.

Extensions

Libraries to help build PHP extensions.

  • PHP CPP - A C++ library for developing PHP extensions.
  • Zephirstars3k - A compiled language between PHP and C++ for developing PHP extensions.

Miscellaneous

Useful libraries or tools that don't fit in the categories above.

  • Annotationsstars6k - An annotations library (part of Doctrine).
  • BotManstars5.4k - A framework agnostic PHP library to build cross-platform chat bots.
  • CakePHP Utilitystars107 - Utility classes such as Inflector, String, Hash, Security and XML.
  • Chiefstars49 - A command bus library.
  • ClassPreloaderstars346 - A library for optimising autoloading.
  • Country Liststars4.7k - A list of all countries with names and ISO 3166-1 codes.
  • Emberastars273 - An Oembed consumer library.
  • Essencestars739 - A library for extracting web media.
  • Exposestars3.3k - An open source PHP tunneling service.
  • Graphvizstars65 - A Graphviz library.
  • Hprose-PHPstars1.9k - A very newbility RPC Library, support 25+ languages now.
  • JSON Lintstars1.2k - A JSON lint utility.
  • JSONPCallbackValidatorstars600 - A library for validating JSONP callbacks.
  • Lockstars782 - A lock library to provide exclusive execution.
  • Metricsstars303 - A simple metrics API library.
  • noCAPTCHAstars316 - Helper for Google's noCAPTCHA (reCAPTCHA).
  • Nmapstars145 - A PHP wrapper around Nmap.
  • Pagerfantastars1.6k - A pagination library.
  • PHP PassBookstars239 - A PHP library for iOS PassBook.
  • PHP-MLstars85 - A library for Machine Learning in PHP.
  • PHPCRstars423 - A PHP port of the Java Content Repository (JCR).
  • PHPStack - A TCP/IP stack proof of concept written in PHP.
  • print_ostars140 - An object graph visualizer.
  • Procrastinatorstars62 - A library for running time consuming tasks.
  • Prooph Service Busstars435 - Lightweight message bus supporting CQRS and Micro Services
  • RMTstars428 - A library for versioning and releasing software.
  • sabre/vobjectstars497 - A library for parsing VCard and iCalendar objects.
  • Safestars1.8k - All PHP functions, rewritten to throw exceptions instead of returning false.
  • Slimdumpstars156 - An easy dumper tool for MySQL.
  • Sporkstars595 - A process forking library.
  • SuperClosurestars1.7k - A library that allows Closures to be serialized.
  • Underscore - A PHP port of the Underscore JS library.

Software

Software for creating a development environment.

PHP Installation

Tools to help install and manage PHP on your computer.

  • Brew PHP Switcherstars751 - Brew PHP switcher.
  • HomeBrew - A package manager for OSX.
  • Laravel Valet - A development environment for macOS.
  • PHP Brewstars4.7k - A PHP version manager and installer.
  • PHP Buildstars905 - Another PHP version installer.
  • PHP OSX - A PHP installer for OSX.

Development Environment

Software and tools for creating a sandboxed development environment.

  • Ansible - A radically simple orchestration framework.
  • Docker - A containerization platform.
  • Laravel Homestead - A local development environment for Laravel.
  • Laradock - A full PHP development environment based on Docker.
  • Puppet - A server automation framework and application.
  • Vagrant - A portable development environment utility.
  • Vessel - Simple Docker development environments for Laravel.

Virtual Machines

Alternative PHP virtual machines.

  • Hack - A programming language for HHVM.
  • HHVMstars16.9k - A Virtual Machine, Runtime and JIT for PHP by Facebook.
  • PeachPiestars1.8k - PHP compiler and runtime for .NET and .NET Core.

Text Editors and IDEs

Text Editors and Integrated Development Environments (IDE) with support for PHP.

  • Eclipse for PHP Developers - A PHP IDE based on the Eclipse platform.
  • Apache NetBeans - An IDE with support for PHP and HTML5.
  • PhpStorm - A commercial PHP IDE.
  • VS Code - An open source code editor.

Web Applications

Web-based applications and tools.

  • 3V4L - An online PHP & HHVM shell.
  • DBVstars1.7k - A database version control application.
  • PHP Queuestars627 - An application for managing queueing backends.
  • MailCatcherstars5.3k - A web tool for capturing and viewing emails.
  • Cachetstars12k - The open source status page system.
  • phpRedisAdminstars2.7k - A simple web interface to manage Redis databases.
  • phpMyAdminstars5.5k - A web interface for MySQL/MariaDB.
  • Adminer - Database management in a single PHP file.
  • Lycheestars5.8k - An easy to use and great looking photo-management-system.

Infrastructure

Infrastructure for providing PHP applications and services.

  • appserver.iostars936 - A multithreaded application server for PHP, written in PHP.
  • php-pmstars6.3k - A process manager, supercharger and load balancer for PHP applications.
  • RoadRunnerstars5.5k - High-performance PHP application server, load-balancer and process manager.

Resources

Various resources, such as books, websites and articles, for improving your PHP development skills and knowledge.

PHP Websites

Useful PHP-related websites.

  • libs.garden: PHP - An overview of fastest growing PHP libraries.
  • Nomad PHP - A online PHP learning resource.
  • Laravel News - The official Laravel blog.
  • PHP Annotated Monthly - A monthly digest of PHP news.
  • PHP Best Practices - A PHP best practice guide.
  • PHP FIG - The PHP Framework Interoperability Group.
  • PHP Package Development Standards - Package development standards for PHP.
  • PHP School - Open Source Learning for PHP.
  • PHP Security - A guide to PHP security.
  • PHP The Right Way - A PHP best practice quick reference guide.
  • PHP UG - A website to help people locate their nearest PHP user group (UG).
  • PHP Versions - Lists which versions of PHP are available on several popular web hosts.
  • PHP Watch - PHP articles, news, upcoming changes, RFCs and more.
  • PHP Weekly - A weekly PHP newsletter.
  • Securing PHP - A newsletter about PHP security and library recommendations.
  • Seven PHP - A website that interviews members of the PHP community.

PHP Books

Fantastic PHP-related books.

  • Domain-Driven Design in PHP - Real examples written in PHP showcasing DDD Architectural Styles.
  • Functional Programming in PHP - This book will show you how to leverage these new PHP5.3+ features by understanding functional programming principles
  • Grumpy PHPUnit - A book about unit testing with PHPUnit by Chris Hartjes.
  • Mastering Object-Orientated PHP - A book about object-orientated PHP by Brandon Savage.
  • Modern PHP New Features and Good Practices - A book about new PHP features and best practices by Josh Lockhart.
  • Modernizing Legacy Applications in PHP - A book about modernizing legacy PHP applications by Paul M. Jones.
  • PHP 7 Upgrade Guide - An ebook covering all of the features and changes in PHP 7 by Colin O'Dell.
  • PHP Pandas - A book about learning to write PHP by Dayle Rees.
  • Scaling PHP Applications - An ebook about scaling PHP applications by Steve Corona.
  • Securing PHP: Core Concepts - A book about common security terms and practices for PHP by Chris Cornutt.
  • Signaling PHP - A book about catching PCNTL signals in CLI scripts by Cal Evans.
  • The Grumpy Programmer's Guide to Building Testable PHP Applications - A book about building testing PHP applications by Chris Hartjes.
  • XML Parsing with PHP - This book covers parsing and validating XML documents, leveraging XPath expressions, and working with namespaces as well as how to create and modify XML files programmatically.

PHP Videos

Fantastic PHP-related videos.

  • Nomad PHP Lightning Talks - 10 to 15 minute Lightning Talks by PHP community members.
  • PHP UK Conference - A collection of videos from the PHP UK Conference.
  • Programming with Anthony - A video series by Anthony Ferrara.
  • Taking PHP Seriously - A talk outlining PHP's strengths by Keith Adams of Facebook.
  • Laracasts - Screencasts about Laravel, Vue JS and more.
  • Laravel YouTube Channel - The official Laravel YouTube channel.
  • SymfonyCasts - Screencasts and tutorials about PHP and Symfony.

PHP Podcasts

Podcasts with a focus on PHP topics.

  • Laravel Podcast - Laravel and PHP development news and discussion.
  • PHP Internals News - A podcast about PHP internals.
  • PHP Roundtable - The PHP Roundtable is a casual gathering of developers discussing topics that PHP nerds care about.
  • PHP Town Hall - A casual PHP podcast by Ben Edmunds and Phil Sturgeon.
  • Voices of the ElePHPant Interviews with the people that make the PHP community special.

PHP Newsletters

PHP-related news directly to your inbox.

  • PHP Weekly - A weekly newsletter about PHP.

PHP Magazines

Fantastic PHP-related magazines.

  • php[architect] - A monthly magazine dedicated to PHP.

PHP Reading

PHP-releated reading materials.

  • Composer Primer - A Composer primer.
  • Composer Stability Flags - An article about Composer stability flags.
  • Composer Versioning - An article about Composer versioning.
  • Create Your Own PHP Framework - A series of articles on how to make your own PHP framework by Fabien Potencier.
  • Don't Worry About BREACH - An article about the BREACH hack and CSRF tokens.
  • On PHP 5.3, Lambda Functions and Closures - An article about lambda functions and closures.
  • PHP Is Much Better Than You Think - An article about the PHP language and ecosystem.
  • PHP Package Checklist - A checklist for successful PHP package development.
  • PHP Sucks! But I Like It! - An article about the pros and cons of PHP.
  • Preventing CSRF Attacks - An article on preventing CSRF attacks.
  • Seven Ways to Screw Up BCrypt - An article about correct BCrypt implementation.
  • The 2018 Guide to Building Secure PHP Software - A guide to building secure PHP software.
  • Use Env - An article about using the unix environment helper.

PHP Internals Reading

Reading materials related to the PHP internals or performance.

  • PHP RFCs - The home of PHP RFCs (Request for Comments).
  • Externals - PHP internal discussions.
  • PHP RFC Watch - Watch the latest PHP RFCs.
  • Disproving the Single Quotes Myth - An article about performance of single and double quoted strings.
  • How Big Are PHP Arrays (And Values) Really? - An article about array internals.
  • How Foreach Works - A detailed StackOverflow answer about foreach.
  • How Long is a Piece of String - An article about string internals.
  • PHP Evaluation Order - An article about evaluation order in PHP.
  • PHP Internals Book - An online book about PHP internals, written by three core developers.
  • Print vs Echo, Which One is Faster? - An article about print and echo performance.
  • The PHP Ternary Operator. Fast or Not? - An article ternary performance.
  • Understanding OpCodes - An article about opcodes.
  • When Does Foreach Copy? - An article about the internals of foreach.
  • Why Objects (Usually) Use Less Memory Than Arrays - An article about object and array internals.
  • You're Being Lied To - An article about internal ZVALs.
  • Collecting Garbage: 1 2 3 - A series about the PHP garbage collection internals.
  • PHP Source Code for Developers: 1 2 3 4 - A series about the PHP source code.

awesomeList.description: A curated list of amazingly awesome PHP libraries, resources and shiny things.
awesomeList.descriptionHTML: A curated list of amazingly awesome PHP libraries, resources and shiny things.
